task: Go to the URL and drag the slider completely to the right to complete the task. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/slider-drag.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL. It then correctly identified the slider element on the page. After some initial confusion regarding variable scope within the REPL, the agent accurately determined the slider's bounding box and executed a precise drag-and-drop operation using Playwright's mouse actions to move the slider completely to the right. The final snapshot confirmed that the slider's value changed to 100 and the page displayed a success message: '✅ Challenge completed successfully! You dragged the slider to the right.' The task was fully satisfied.
